case_title: UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A. VS. BRENNAN NEWSOM et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 21,2002
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Deborah Neville. Plaintiff represented by Mark A. Serlin, Esq. Default entered against Brennan Newson. April Bufka, Vice President of Union Bank of California was sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the Court signs judgment as follows: Principal: $101,027.08; Interest: $1,9835.74; Fees: $2,483.25; Costs: $256.00 for a total judgment of $105,702.07. Order signed in open court.
